text.title: Agent Drift Detection (Statistical) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-drift-detection-statistical is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Daily alert fires every 3rd day; team ignores it.
antipattern.reason: Binary threshold, no CUSUM, no severity band.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r1 + r4: CUSUM + yellow/red bands.

antipattern.description: Deploy rolled out, judge score down 8 points by week 2.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r1 + r5: CUSUM with retest before deploy gate.

antipattern.description: Output distribution shifted but pass-rate unchanged; users complain.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r2: track KL on a bucketed output distribution.
